item.description:
# Clip 1.3.8
Clip 1.3.8 makes the menu bar experience faster, more reliable, and more consistent across recording and Live Share.
## Menu bar
- Switch between Clip's normal, recording, Live Share, and viewer screens inside one stable popover, avoiding delayed focus and first-click misses. - Expand each menu row's real click target so capture, display, and recent recording actions respond reliably. - Keep the normal menu fully visible after returning from Live Share. - Replace the nested recording card with a compact, flat recording status layout that belongs directly to the popover.
## Live Share
- Make Native the default Web Viewer scale mode. - Show a trusted friend's saved name in the viewer list after their identity has been cryptographically verified. - Simplify the pre-share joining guidance and remove implementation-specific wording from the Friends section.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
